title: ‘My fingers were purple’: Tick-borne disease nearly killed a Canadian man - CTV News
description: ‘My fingers were purple’: Tick-borne disease nearly killed a Canadian man  CTV NewsA ‘rapidly rising’ tick-borne disease is making rounds in Canada. It’s not Lyme disease.
